features.name: static cast to typedef with parameterized type
features.description: Code should include a static cast expression targeting a typedef that uses a parameterized type

features.name: unpacked array of parameterized type
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array declaration using a parameterized type as the element type
features.snippet:
parameter type data_t = logic;
input data_t[7:0] in_data;

features.name: typedef using parameterized type array
features.description: Code should include a typedef that defines an unpacked array using a parameterized type
features.snippet:
parameter type data_t = logic;
typedef data_t[7:0] in_data_t;
